title: Card Data
description: The core character definition data for a Character Card V4, including personality, prompts, lorebook, and behavioral settings.

description.title: Description
description.description: The character's description, typically including appearance, background, and other defining traits.

personality.title: Personality
personality.description: A summary of the character's personality traits and behavioral tendencies.

scenario.title: Scenario
scenario.description: The current scenario or setting for the conversation.

first_mes.title: First Message
first_mes.description: The character's opening message at the start of a conversation.

mes_example.title: Message Examples
mes_example.description: Example message exchanges demonstrating the character's speech patterns and behavior.

system_prompt.title: System Prompt
system_prompt.description: System-level instructions for the AI model when roleplaying this character.

post_history_instructions.title: Post-History Instructions
post_history_instructions.description: Instructions inserted after the chat history, typically as a jailbreak or reminder prompt.

alternate_greetings.title: Alternate Greetings
alternate_greetings.description: Alternative opening messages that can be used instead of the primary first message.

character_book.title: Character Book
character_book.description: An embedded lorebook containing world-building entries for this character.

nickname.title: Nickname
nickname.description: An alternative short name or nickname for the character.

group_only_greetings.title: Group-Only Greetings
group_only_greetings.description: Opening messages used exclusively in group chat contexts.

card_variables.title: Card Variables
card_variables.description: User-configurable variables that allow customization of the character's behavior.

related_characters.title: Related Characters
related_characters.description: Characters related to this one, such as friends, rivals, or family members.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Implementation-specific extended data for this character.

recommended-settings.title: Recommended Settings
recommended-settings.description: Model and sampler settings recommended by the card creator for optimal results.

min_context.title: Minimum Context
min_context.description: Minimum context window size in tokens recommended for this model.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Recommended temperature setting for text generation.

max_tokens.title: Max Tokens
max_tokens.description: Recommended maximum number of tokens to generate per response.

prompt_format.title: Prompt Format
prompt_format.description: Recommended prompt format for this character.

content_rating.title: Content Rating
content_rating.description: The intended content rating for this character.

prompt-overrides.title: Prompt Overrides
prompt-overrides.description: Overrides and templates for how the character's data is assembled into the final prompt.

system_prompt_prefix.title: System Prompt Prefix
system_prompt_prefix.description: Text prepended to the system prompt.

system_prompt_suffix.title: System Prompt Suffix
system_prompt_suffix.description: Text appended to the system prompt.

char_definition_template.title: Character Definition Template
char_definition_template.description: Template string for formatting the character definition block.

context_prefix.title: Context Prefix
context_prefix.description: Text prepended to the conversation context.

context_suffix.title: Context Suffix
context_suffix.description: Text appended to the conversation context.

example_separator.title: Example Separator
example_separator.description: String used to separate example message exchanges.

example_as_system.title: Example as System
example_as_system.description: When true, example messages are sent as system messages rather than user/assistant messages.

related-character.title: Related Character
related-character.description: A character related to this one, with relationship context for group chats and narrative continuity.

card_uri.title: Card URI
card_uri.description: URI to the related character's card file.

relationship_context.title: Relationship Context
relationship_context.description: Additional narrative context about the relationship.

group_dynamic.title: Group Dynamic
group_dynamic.description: Description of how this character interacts with the related character in group settings.

group-behavior.title: Group Behavior
group-behavior.description: Settings controlling how this character behaves in group chat contexts.

initiative.title: Initiative
initiative.description: How likely the character is to speak unprompted in group chats, from 0.0 (passive) to 1.0 (highly proactive).

response_to.title: Response To
response_to.description: List of character names this character is most likely to respond to in group chats.

role.title: Role
role.description: The character's role in group dynamics (e.g., 'leader', 'mediator', 'comic-relief').

persona-hints.title: Persona Hints
persona-hints.description: Suggestions for the user's persona when interacting with this character.

suggested_name.title: Suggested Name
suggested_name.description: A suggested name for the user's persona.

suggested_persona.title: Suggested Persona
suggested_persona.description: A suggested persona description for the user.

assumed_traits.title: Assumed Traits
assumed_traits.description: Traits the character assumes about the user.

suggested_user_icon.title: Suggested User Icon
suggested_user_icon.description: Name of an asset to use as the user's icon when chatting with this character.
